dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the dataset for an OCDNet experiment.

quant_calibration_dataset.description: Configurable parameters for quantization calibration dataset.

images_dir.description: Path to the directory containing calibration images.
images_dir.title: calibration images directory

train_dataset.description: Hyper parameters to configure the training dataset.

args.description: Configurable parameters to construct the training dataset.

ignore_tags.description: List of labels that are not used to train
ignore_tags.title: ignore_tags

data_path.description: The list of training dataset paths
data_path.title: data_path

loader.description: Configurable parameters to construct the training dataloader.

num_workers.description: The threads used to load data.
num_workers.title: num_workers

pin_memory.description: Flag to enable pinned memory or not
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

shuffle.description: Flag to shuffle the data or not.
shuffle.title: shuffle

train_dataset.title: train_dataset

validate_dataset.description: Hyper parameters to configure the validation dataset.

args.description: Configurable parameters to construct the validation dataset.

ignore_tags.description: List of labels that are not used to evaluate
ignore_tags.title: ignore_tags

data_path.description: The list of training dataset paths
data_path.title: data_path

loader.description: Configurable parameters to construct the validation dataloader.

num_workers.description: The threads used to load data.
num_workers.title: num_workers

pin_memory.description: Flag to enable pinned memory or not
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

shuffle.description: Flag to shuffle the data or not
shuffle.title: shuffle

validate_dataset.title: validate_dataset

inference.description: Configurable parameters to construct the inferencer for an OCDNet experiment.

batch_size.description: The batch size of the input Tensor. This is important if batch_size > 1 for large dataset.
batch_size.title: batch size

checkpoint.description: Path to the checkpoint used for inference.
checkpoint.title: Checkpoint path

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the inference on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in inference.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

input_folder.description: The input folder for test images
input_folder.title: input_folder

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the inference job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the inference on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

post_processing.description: Configurable parameters to construct the Postprocessing.

args.description: Configurable parameters to construct the postprocessing.

unclip_ratio.description: The unclip ratio using the Vatti clipping algorithm.
unclip_ratio.title: unclip_ratio

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

show.description: Flag to show the pred image
show.title: show

trt_engine.description:
Path to the TensorRT engine to be used for inference.
                    This only works with :code:`tao-deploy`.
trt_engine.title: TensorRT Engine

model.description: Configurable parameters to construct the model for an OCDNet experiment.

activation_checkpoint.description: Flag to use activation checkpoints to save GPU memory, only for the FAN-tiny backbone
activation_checkpoint.title: activation_checkpoint

backbone.description:
The backbone name of the model.
                    It supports deformable_resnet18, deformable_resnet50 and fan_tiny_8_p4_hybrid.
backbone.title: backbone

enlarge_feature_map_size.description: Flag to enlarge the output feature map size of the FAN-tiny backbone
enlarge_feature_map_size.title: enlarge_feature_map_size

fuse_qkv_proj.description: Flag to fuse the qkv projection
fuse_qkv_proj.title: fuse_qkv_proj

in_channels.description: Number of input channels in FPN
in_channels.title: in_channels

inner_channels.description: Number of inner channels in FPN
inner_channels.title: inner_channels

load_pruned_graph.description: Flag to load pruned model or not.
load_pruned_graph.title: load_pruned_graph

pretrained.description: Flag to use pretrained model or not.
pretrained.title: pretrained

pretrained_model_path.description: [Optional] Path to a pretrained model file.
pretrained_model_path.title: pretrained model path

pruned_graph_path.description: [Optional] Path to a pruned model file.
pruned_graph_path.title: pruned model path

model_name.description: Name of model if invoking task via :code:`model_agnostic`
model_name.title: Model name

algorithm.description: Calibration/optimization algorithm. Used by ModelOpt backends (modelopt.pytorch and modelopt.onnx). Ignored by torchao backend.
algorithm.title: Calibration algorithm

backend_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the backend
backend_kwargs.title: Backend kwargs

device.description: Device to use for calibration. Accepts 'cuda' (uses default GPU), 'cpu', 'trt' (TensorRT for ONNX backend), or specific GPU device like 'cuda:0', 'cuda:1', etc. If 'cuda' is specified but no GPU is available, the framework will automatically fall back to 'cpu'. Note: 'trt' is only supported by the modelopt.onnx backend for ONNX Runtime with TensorRT execution provider.
device.title: Calibration device

layers.description: List of per-module quantization configurations. Each entry specifies which modules to quantize and their data types. This is the primary way to configure quantization.
layers.title: Layer quantization configs

model_path.description: Path to the model to be quantized. For ONNX backend, path to ONNX file.
model_path.title: Model path

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

skip_names.description: List of module/layer names or patterns to exclude from quantization
skip_names.title: Skip names

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the trainer for an OCDNet experiment.

checkpoint_interval.description: The interval (in epochs) at which a checkpoint will be saved. Helps resume training.
checkpoint_interval.title: Checkpoint interval

checkpoint_interval_unit.description: The unit of the checkpoint interval.
checkpoint_interval_unit.title: Checkpoint interval unit

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the training on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in train.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

is_dry_run.description: Flag to run only one batch for debugging purposes
is_dry_run.title: is_dry_run

loss.description: Hyper parameters to configure the loss.
loss.title: loss

lr_scheduler.description: Hyper parameters to configure the learning rate scheduler.

args.description: Configurable parameters to construct the learning scheduler.

warmup_epoch.description: The warmup epoch to the initial learning rate. Should be different from the num_epochs.
warmup_epoch.title: warmup_epoch

lr_scheduler.title: lr_scheduler

metric.description: Hyper parameters to configure the metric.

args.description: Configurable parameters to construct the metric computing.

is_output_polygon.description: Flag to output polygon or BBOX
is_output_polygon.title: is_output_polygon

metric.title: metric

num_epochs.description: Number of epochs to run the training.
num_epochs.title: Number of epochs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the train job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the training on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

optimizer.description: Hyper parameters to configure the optimizer.

args.description: Configurable parameters to construct the optimizer.

amsgrad.description: Flag to use AMSGrad as stochastic optimization method
amsgrad.title: amsgrad

momentum.description: The momentum for the Adam optimizer.
momentum.title: momentum - Adam

optimizer.title: optimizer

post_processing.description: Hyper parameters to configure the post_processing.

args.description: Configurable parameters to construct the postprocessing.

unclip_ratio.description: The unclip ratio using the Vatti clipping algorithm.
unclip_ratio.title: unclip_ratio

post_processing.title: post_processing

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

resume_training_checkpoint_path.description: Path to the checkpoint to resume training from.
resume_training_checkpoint_path.title: Resume checkpoint path

seed.description: The seed for the initializer in PyTorch. If < 0, disable fixed seed.
seed.title: Seed for randomization

trainer.description: Hyper parameters to configure the trainer.

clip_grad_norm.description:
Amount to clip the gradient by L2 Norm.
        A value of 0.0 specifies no clipping.
clip_grad_norm.title: clip gradient norm

trainer.title: trainer

use_distributed_sampler.description: Use distributed sampler for multi-GPU training
use_distributed_sampler.title: use_distributed_sampler

validation_interval.description:
The interval (in epochs) at which a evaluation
        will be triggered on the validation dataset.
validation_interval.title: Validation interval
